---
title: "promote_to_rank"
generated: true
description: "Promote a tensor to a rank-`rank` tensor by prepending singleton dimensions. If the tensor is already rank-`rank`, this is a no-op."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.numerics.tensor_ops`](../nitrix-numerics-tensor_ops.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix._internal.util`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:promote_to_rank -->
```python
promote_to_rank(tensor: Shaped[Array, ...], rank: int) -> Shaped[Array, ...]
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:promote_to_rank -->
Promote a tensor to a rank-`rank` tensor by prepending singleton
dimensions. If the tensor is already rank-`rank`, this is a no-op.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:promote_to_rank -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `tensor` | `Shaped[Array, ...]` | — | — | — |
| `rank` | `int` | — | — | — |

**Returns** `Shaped[Array, ...]`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
